original_prompt:
A clean icon sprite sheet of 16 icons arranged in a 4x4 grid on a PURE WHITE background (#ffffff, nothing else). 

ABSOLUTE RULES — violations ruin the output:
- NO drop shadow under any icon
- NO soft halo glow around any icon
- NO outer bloom or edge fade
- NO gradient background
- NO textured background  
- NO checkerboard pattern
- NO rounded dividing lines between cells
- Only the 16 icon shapes exist on a pure uniform #ffffff white canvas
- Each icon is a flat vector silhouette with crisp 100%-opaque edges

Style reference: lucide-icons or heroicons — simple, flat, single-color or two-color geometric shapes. Think SVG icon, not illustration.

Icons (top-left to bottom-right, with primary color specified):
1. Rounded-square filled in #7aa2f7 blue containing a white 'W' monogram
2. Simple arrow cursor pointer in solid #1a1b26 dark navy
3. Dashed-stroke rectangle outline in #1a1b26
4. Two small dots connected by a single curved line, #1a1b26
5. 8-point asterisk star, flat solid #ff9e64 orange fill
6. Solid diamond/rhombus in #9ece6a green
7. Diamond outline only (2px stroke, no fill) in #7dcfff cyan
8. Solid filled rectangle in #1a1b26 (terminal block)
9. Small filled #9ece6a green dot surrounded by one concentric ring, green
10. Circle in #565f89 gray with a bold white X centered
11. Lightning bolt zigzag, flat solid #e0af68 yellow
12. Two vertical thick bars in #bb9af7 purple
13. Three small #1a1b26 dots with short diagonal lines behind them
14. Two overlapping sine waves in #bb9af7 purple
15. Three stylized human silhouettes grouped together in #1a1b26
16. Gear cog with 6 teeth, outlined in #1a1b26

No labels, no text, no annotations, no captions, no numbers. Just 16 pristine icons on #ffffff.
